summary.sodex: Community sentiment around Sodex is cautiously optimistic amid low-volume trading and anticipation for rewards, with users highlighting its high-performance order-book features on ValueChain, bug bounties attracting developers (472 likes on official post), and ongoing SoPoints farming for weekly snapshots targeting 50k+ volume. Key discussions focus on steady growth despite $SOSO price stagnation concerns, high unlocks, and lack of new listings, yet traders praise low fees and 5% referral boosts; one post notes 35k volume maintained against competitors for funding. Engagement peaks at 472 likes for the V3 bug bounty announcement, but non-official posts show modest metrics (14-65 likes), reflecting dedicated but small trader base awaiting May developments.
